438 M0900D_HEALD_STG_4_ULCR_NUM M0900D_HEALD_STG_4_ULCR_NUM M0900D Healed Stage 4 Pressure Ulcer Number CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of Stage 4 pressure ulcers present on the prior assessment (OBRA, or Scheduled PPS) that have completely closed (resurfaced with epithelium). discontinued 9/30/2018
